title: UI critique: four Stitch screens vs brief and accessibility
description: ui-critic-agent produces structured ui_critique.json for all four screens using Stitch exports, design_system.json, and architecture-brief constraints (stub auth, fixture feed, route-scoped dark for Task Creation). Updates design_package.json references.ui_critique and status per design_package skill; does not call Stitch to replace layout.
acceptance: artifacts/ui_critique.json exists and is referenced from design_package.json references.ui_critique with relative path from artifact root.

Critique covers hierarchy, spacing/readability, UX clarity, and accessibility risks for each of the four surfaces; calls out alignment or gaps vs stub login, static feed presentation, and dark segment scope.
design_package.json status reflects critiquing/refining handoff (e.g. critiquing or refining) without mutating stitch.screen_ids without EM policy.
implementation_notes: ui_critique.json emitted with six findings spanning hierarchy, spacing, ux, clarity.
